title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. solstitialis
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. solstitialis, also known as the Solstitial Rose or the Wild Rose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. solstitialis include its ability to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a good night's sleep. Rosa × dumetorum subvar. solstitialis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
